title: Immersive Vehicles - Official Content Pack [OCP] - Planes & Cars
description: Official Content Pack with planes, cars, tanks, helicopters and trucks for the Immersive Vehicles mod!
body:
# Immersive Vehicles - Official Content Pack ## Coremod "Minecraft Transport Simulator" is required! ([Project Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles)). ![](https://i.imgur.com/CxBu34m.png)[![](https://i.imgur.com/wi3yEwu.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles-official-automobile-pack)[![](https://i.imgur.com/dWes3um.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-automotives)![](https://i.imgur.com/cEQDpXv.png) OCP contains state of the art planes, cars, tanks, helicopters and trucks that are functionally kept simple to not only show off what is possible with the Immersive Vehicles mod from a technical standpoint, but also provide a carefully contructed immersive and user-friendly flying and driving experience. All vehicles and parts are craftable in survival. Have an indepth look at the vehicles below! ![e](https://i.imgur.com/cEQDpXv.png)



![Skyhawk](https://i.imgur.com/RxK3sCS.png)

![MC-172 & Bell47g](https://i.imgur.com/MfGIpIt.png)

![Eclipse500 & Comanche](https://i.imgur.com/ybvv7Xa.png)

![Vulcanair & Trimotor](https://i.imgur.com/aE3MVrL.png)

![PZL-P11 & PZL.37 Los](https://i.imgur.com/HY7wchP.png)





 


![Merc & Quad](https://i.imgur.com/aNKRbE4.png)

![FT17 & Firetruck](https://i.imgur.com/5HEH2rk.png)

![GMC & Scout](https://i.imgur.com/blFi6rM.png)

![Mustang](https://i.imgur.com/F6iFmRL.png)



![Armament](https://i.imgur.com/3d3yeOk.png)



 


![Signs & Decor](https://i.imgur.com/otpbypM.png)   ![Immersive Vehicles](https://i.imgur.com/cEQDpXv.png) Immersive Vehicles        OCP GitHub              MTS Discord
